2277140.name: World of Turtle Demo
2277140.description:
World of Turtle Demo is a crazy puzzle game with 30 levels.



Navigate Babo Turtle through collapsing grounds, slide on ice, ride on turtles, kick penguins.
Collect all fruits and reach the helicopter landing zone.

Controls:
The game is playable with Keyboard or Gamepad.

This is a free DEMO version of World of Turtle. It has 30 levels. To play all 100 levels, purchase the full version.

Languages:
Korea, French, English.
2277140.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 韩语
